form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. When well in the market at debut, 2nd in a small field at Morphettville Parks 2yo Sw+P on February 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Chica Astuta carrying 56.5kg at $3. Last start 2nd in a small field at Caulfield in the LR St Albans Stks on March 21 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Rich On Bubbles carrying 58kg at $4.60. Capable of a better showing. Rates highly and gets his chance to break through.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Lining up for just third start. When well in the market at debut, 2nd in a small field at Morphettville Parks 2yo Sw+P on February 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Chica Astuta carrying 56.5kg at $3. Last start 2nd in a small field at Caulfield in the LR St Albans Stks on March 21 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Rich On Bubbles carrying 58kg at $4.60. Capable of a better showing. Rates highly and gets his chance to break through.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run won by 1.75 len at Ballarat 2yo Mdn-Sw March 10 over 1200m defeating King's Address carrying 58kg at $4.60. The start before that 4th of 8 at Flemington in the LR Festival on February 28 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Gin Twist with 57kg at $18. Have to respect again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Form hard to fault. At the latest run won by 1.75 len at Ballarat 2yo Mdn-Sw March 10 over 1200m defeating King's Address carrying 58kg at $4.60. The start before that 4th of 8 at Flemington in the LR Festival on February 28 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Gin Twist with 57kg at $18. Have to respect again.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 8 at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1112m, on heavy track; 5 len behind Lagunanini with 58kg at $10. Last start came home strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 10 at this track 2yo Hcp on March 25 over 1400m, slow going 0.8 len behind Hydrobomb carrying 57.5kg at $9.50. Will be hard to hold out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Had two starts to date. Last start came home strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 10 at this track 2yo Hcp on March 25 over 1400m, slow going 0.8 len behind Hydrobomb carrying 57.5kg at $9.50. Will be hard to hold out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up when unable to obtain a clear run from the 500m until the 200m.

form.formComment: Two-year-old gelding making debut by D'argento out of I'm A Jewel. Won a barrier trial over 1000m at Caulfield Heath on March 26. Looks handy, respecting.

form.formComment: Gelding by Royal Meeting facing the starter for the first time. Finished sixth in a Caulfield Heath trial over 1000m on March 26. Unplaced in recent trials and others appear to have his measure.

form.formComment: Two-year-old colt (Magna Grecia - Parthesia). He has four recent trials prior to his debut today. Finished fourth in a Cranbourne jump-out on March 16. Market best guide.
